title: Electrix' Finest Selection
description: A lightweight modpack focused on travel and exploration.
body:
## Electrix' Finest Selection


is a lightweight modpack focused on travel and exploration. There's plenty to discover without changing the world too much! With Immersive Aircraft, you can reach your destination quickly!

Find dozens of new structures and dungeons all over the world!

Collect your loot with Travelers Backpacks and create a huge storage system with Tom's Simple Storage!

Start your engines and enjoy the flight!
